headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid BAX and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: What a brutal six months it’s been for Baxter. The stock has dropped 24.9% and now trades at $16.81, rattling many shareholders. This was partly driven by its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Bank of America Maintains a Hold Rating on Baxter International (BAX)
summary: Baxter International Inc. (NYSE:BAX) is one of the Best Mid Cap Value Stocks to Buy in 2026.
